title: Part Feeding Projects Applying
description:
Part Feeding Projects Applying

Applying the Part Feeding Option to a Project

To apply the Part Feeding option to a project, follow the procedure below.

(1) Open the existing project you wish to apply the option to.

Or, create a new project.

(2) Epson RC+ 8.0-Menu-[Tools]-[Part Feeding].

The following window is displayed.

(3) Click the [Add] button.

Run the Part Wizard.

(4) Follow the steps of the Part Wizard to complete the part setting. For details, refer to the Software Part Wizard.

When this happens, a Part Feeding option-specific program file will be added to the project. Refer to Creating a Project for more details.
